name: Paper 3 · 区域专题（HL）
subject: history
domain_name: IA 与 Paper / IA & Papers / IA & Papers
curriculum_points: Students will be able to construct three in-depth, analytical essays on aspects of the history of a specific region, demonstrating detailed knowledge and conceptual understanding (HL Exam).
Students will be able to evaluate different historical perspectives and interpretations in their essays, showing awareness of historiographical debate.
